bodyShape: Sleek, petite fennec fox sitting on a tiny, tattered magic carpet.
hair: Sandy fur with intricate henna-like dark brown patterns etched into it.
clothing: No traditional clothes, but wears a glowing purple gem amulet and carries an oversized, ink-stained calligraphy quill.
distinguishingFeatures: Unnaturally large ears that emit a soft golden magical glow. A bushy tail that curls gracefully.
idleAnimation: Gently bobs up and down on her hovering magic carpet, occasionally swishing her bushy tail.
talkingAnimation: Leans forward with a sly grin, pointing her oversized quill assertively while her glowing ears twitch.
happyAnimation: Does a quick mid-air flip on her carpet, scattering golden magical sparkles, landing with a smug pose.
sadAnimation: Ears droop dramatically, carpet sinks lower to the ground, and she hides her face behind her large bushy tail.
